title: taraxacum lutescens
intro: Taraxacum lutescens, also known as the yellow dandelion or yellow hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum lutescens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
